ANCIENTSAWAKENED-EGOCENTRISM.description: If this is in your hand at the end of your turn, [gold]Transform[/gold] ALL cards in your hand into [gold]Egocentrism[/gold].
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-EGOCENTRISM.title: Egocentrism
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-BREAK_BENEATH_ME.descri:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. 
 Take an extra turn after this one.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-BREAK_BENEATH_ME.title: Break Beneath Me
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-DEMONIC_STRIKE.title: Demonic Strike
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-DEMONIC_DEFEND.title: Demonic Defend
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-DEADLY_STRIKE.title: Deadly Strike
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-DEADLY_DEFEND.title: Deadly Defend
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-COSMIC_STRIKE.title: Cosmic Strike
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-COSMIC_DEFEND.descripti:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. 
 Add 1 random Minion card into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-COSMIC_DEFEND.title: Cosmic Defend
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-ETERNAL_STRIKE.title: Eternal Strike
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-ETERNAL_DEFEND.descript:
[gold]Summon[/gold] {Summon:diff()}. 
 Add a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Soul+|Soul}[/gold] into your draw pile.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-ETERNAL_DEFEND.title: Eternal Defend
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-EMPOWERED_STRIKE.descri:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage twice. 
 Add a [gold]Dazed[/gold] into your hand.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-EMPOWERED_STRIKE.title: Empowered Strike
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-EMPOWERED_DEFEND.title: Empowered Defend
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-TRIPLE_BARREL_SHOTGUN.d:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies {Repeat:diff()} times. 
 Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-HEAVY_CRATE.description: Can be opened at the start of the next act.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-HEAVY_CRATE.title: Heavy Crate
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-WEIGHED_DOWN.title: Weighed Down
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-CINDERBORN.title: Cinderborn
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-SLEIGHT_OF_HAND.descrip:
Apply {PoisonPower:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold]. 
 Whenever you discard another card, add this to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-SLEIGHT_OF_HAND.title: Viper
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-NEBULA_HAMMER.title: Starfaller
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-NECROTIC_BURST.title: Necrotic Burst
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-ELECTROLYZE.title: Electrolyze
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-SQUIRREL.title: Squirrel
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-INSCRYBE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. 
 Choose a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] to make a copy of.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-INSCRYBE.title: Inscrybe
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-LUNATIC_RITUAL.descript:
Gain {RitualPower:diff()} [gold]Ritual[/gold]. 
 At the start of your turn, deal {LunaticRitualPower:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-LUNATIC_RITUAL.title: Lunatic Ritual
